title: WiseTech Global to cut 30% workforce as AI ends era of manual coding
description: WiseTech Global Ltd. plans to cut about 2,000 jobs—almost 30% of its workforce—under an AI-driven revamp, crystallising efficiencies from artificial intelligence that are upending the global software industry. In a candid and full-blooded embrace of AI, Chief Executive Officer Zubin Appoo on Wednesday laid out what he said were unprecedented benefits for the freight software provider.

title: Thomson Reuters (TRI) Soars 11.4% as AI Business Attracts 1M Customers
description: We recently published 10 Stocks Winning the Market. Thomson Reuters Corp. (NASDAQ:TRI) was one of the best performers on Tuesday. Thomson Reuters snapped a three-day losing streak on Tuesday, soaring 11.41 percent to close at $90.09 apiece, as investors took heart from the surge to 1 million users of its AI-powered assistant business, CoCounsel. title: Apple acquires one-person AI startup focused on photonics
description: Apple has quietly acquired the assets of invrs.io, a one-person AI startup specialising in photonics research, according to a new European Union filing. The deal also brings founder Martin Schubert to Apple, signalling deeper investment in AI-driven design for future hardware products.

title: OpenAI appoints Arvind KC as Chief People Officer to guide next phase of AI growth
description: Arvind KC joins OpenAI as the new Chief People Officer. He will be reporting to Jason Kwon, OpenAI’s chief strategy officer.
